caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Remain Mild
caribbean.paragraph: Ocho Rios is experiencing 12 kt winds with 3.0 ft wave heights and less than 10% is not applicable due to 100% rain probability, while St. Lucia has 11 kt winds. I expect these mild wind conditions to prevail across the Western Caribbean and Lesser Antilles today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Cadiz
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing strong winds of 21 kt and significant wave heights of 5.9 ft, with a dominant swell direction from the west and a swell period of 14 s, while Lisbon is seeing relatively calmer conditions with winds of 13 kt. The most notable weather feature today is the heavy rain in Cadiz, with a 100% rain probability, making it the top impact port in the Mediterranean.
